scripts.types:sync:prisma: bun run --filter @libre-train/server db:generate && mkdir -p shared/generated && rimraf shared/generated/prisma && cp -R server/infrastructure/generated/prisma shared/generated/prisma
scripts.clean:all: rimraf node_modules bun.lock && bun run --parallel --no-exit-on-error --workspaces clean:all
scripts.build: bun run types:sync:prisma && bun run --filter @libre-train/shared build && bun run --sequential --filter '!@libre-train/shared' build
scripts.build:clean: bun run clean && bun run build
